name: Instant Potato Lefse
recipeInstructions:
1. Place instant potato flakes, salt and butter in a mixing bowl.
2. Add boiling water to milk and add to potato mixture.
3. Mix quickly until thick and smooth.
4. Add just enough flour to be able to handle dough.
5. Knead lightly.
6. Form into balls and roll very thin on floured board.
7. Bake on hot electric lefse grill (any griddle will work), turning to brown both sides.
